competitors.name: Nosana
recentDevelopments: Focus on AI model training workloads

valueProposition: GDPR compliant with clear data residency

insights.headline: Enterprise GPU Market Underserved
insights.description: Competitors focus on decentralized consumer GPU sharing, leaving enterprise segment with specific compliance and performance requirements underserved.
insights.implication: Aethir's dedicated enterprise model captures high-value segment with less direct competition.

insights.headline: IO.NET Expanding Enterprise Features
insights.description: IO.NET is introducing enterprise tiers with better quality control, potentially closing the gap with Aethir.
insights.implication: Need to accelerate enterprise feature development and strengthen partnerships.

insights.headline: Position as Enterprise Alternative
insights.description: Market confused about decentralized vs. enterprise GPU solutions. Aethir needs clear positioning.
insights.implication: Develop 'Enterprise-Grade Decentralized Compute' narrative and sales collateral.

nextSteps: Develop case studies with early enterprise customers
Create competitive battle cards for sales team
Monitor IO.NET enterprise feature roadmap monthly
Explore partnership opportunities with OEM hardware providers
